nodes.label: Adaptive Element Relocation
nodes.summary: Fingerprints an element (tag/text/attrs/siblings/path/parent) on first scrape, then re-finds it by fuzzy similarity scoring when the selector later breaks. Default 40% threshold. SQLite-backed, pluggable storage.

nodes.label: Converter Pipeline
nodes.summary: Priority-sorted pluggable converter registry. Source-type dispatch → layered file detection → sorted converter chain. First accepts+succeeds wins. Output normalized to clean Markdown.

nodes.label: PDF Conversion
nodes.summary: Dual-library PDF extraction: pdfplumber primary (table/form column detection, page.close() memory management) → pdfminer fallback. Markdown tables from column-clustered word positions.

nodes.label: Office Doc Conversion
nodes.summary: DOCX/PPTX/XLSX → Markdown via python-docx, python-pptx, pandas. Tables go HTML→Markdown via HtmlConverter.convert_string(). PPTX handles charts, speaker notes, and optional LLM image captions.

nodes.label: ZIP Archive Traversal
nodes.summary: Recursive ZIP extraction: iterate entries → BytesIO streams → call parent pipeline on each file. Silent skip on conversion failure. Nested ZIPs handled automatically.

nodes.label: Plugin System
nodes.summary: importlib.metadata entry_points discovery under group 'markitdown.plugin'. Lazy load with fault isolation. register_converters(host, **kwargs) callback pattern. __plugin_interface_version__ for forward compat.

nodes.label: Magika File Detection
nodes.summary: Layered type detection: extension+MIME hints → mimetypes bidirectional enrichment → Magika ML content scan → charset_normalizer for text files. Returns ranked StreamInfo list.

nodes.label: Image + LLM Captioning
nodes.summary: JPEG/PNG converter with two optional layers: exiftool subprocess for EXIF metadata, OpenAI-compatible vision API for image description. Both independently optional. Output: key-values + ## Description.

nodes.label: Audio Transcription
nodes.summary: WAV/MP3/M4A/MP4 → Markdown via speech_recognition (Google Web Speech API) + exiftool metadata. Duration excluded (wrong from memory stream). Temp file needed for non-WAV formats.

nodes.label: YouTube Extraction
nodes.summary: YouTube watch URL → Markdown. Meta tag scrape for views/keywords/duration. Recursive ytInitialData JSON search for description. youtube_transcript_api with 3-retry logic for transcript.

nodes.label: HTML Web Conversion
nodes.summary: BeautifulSoup + custom markdownify subclass. Strips scripts/styles, extracts body, RecursionError fallback to plaintext. convert_string() helper used by DOCX/PPTX/XLSX for table rendering. Wikipedia/RSS/Bing specializations.

nodes.label: Azure Doc Intelligence
nodes.summary: Azure prebuilt-layout model for OCR-grade extraction of PDFs, images, Office files. Submits bytes, gets native Markdown back, strips HTML comments. OCR features (high-res, formulas, fonts) enabled only for PDF/image types.

nodes.label: Agent Output Contract
nodes.summary: 5-law output contract enforced via SKILL.md prompt text: no Sources block, no invented headers, space-dash-space separators, no ## inside body sections, verbatim footer passthrough. Zero runtime validation.

nodes.label: Multi-Source Research Engine
nodes.summary: ThreadPoolExecutor fan-out to 6–20 sources. Depth tiers (quick/default/deep) cap source count. 2-phase retrieval with 5xx retry. Unified Report schema. Five emit formats (compact/json/context/md/html).

nodes.label: Entity Resolution
nodes.summary: 4 parallel searches resolve topic → {subreddits, handles, repos, context}. X handles get 3× URL weight. GitHub -action canonicalization. News context capped at 300 chars for LLM injection.

nodes.label: Engagement Signal Ranking
nodes.summary: Two-stage: RRF (k=60, topic-sensitive source_weights) then LLM rerank of top-N. Quality nudge detects degraded sources via domain diversity + snippet density. All inputs from pipeline Report.

nodes.label: Cross-Source Clustering
nodes.summary: Two-pass clustering: Pass 1 greedy text similarity (0.42/0.48 thresholds), Pass 2 entity overlap on small clusters. MMR picks up to 3 reps per cluster. Polymarket isolation, same-source enforcement.

nodes.label: Multi-Tier Credentials
nodes.summary: Tier 1 keyless (Reddit/HN/Polymarket/GitHub), Tier 2 browser cookies (X via Bird/Chrome/Safari/xurl, YouTube via yt-dlp/SSH), Tier 3 API keys (.env dual hierarchy, perms 600). Preflight startup checks.

nodes.label: Schema-Driven Extraction
nodes.summary: Playwright page + Zod/JSON schema → typed object. Preprocess page, then AI SDK generateText with schema as `output` constraint, read result.output. Schema is both TS type and runtime constraint. One method: run(). No retry loop.

nodes.label: Streaming Partial Objects
nodes.summary: stream() variant: AI SDK streamText with schema output → partialOutputStream async iterable. Each emission is a schema-conformant partial; last is complete. Mirror of run() but returns {stream,url}. For responsive UIs.

nodes.label: Page Format Pipeline
nodes.summary: preprocess(page,options) → {url,content,format}. Six formats: raw_html, markdown (Turndown), text (Mozilla Readability via CDN in-page), html (cleanup scrub, default), image (base64 screenshot), custom. Cost/fidelity dial.

nodes.label: HTML Cleanup
nodes.summary: In-browser DOM scrub via page.evaluate. Removes ~30 tag types (script/style/media/form/nav/head) and prefix-strips noise attributes (style/src/on*/aria-/data-). Mutates live DOM. href kept. Token-diet for the default html format.

nodes.label: Scraper Code Generation
nodes.summary: generate() asks LLM to write a self-contained IIFE JS scraper for page+schema instead of extracting. Plain generateText (schema as context, not constraint). stripMarkdownBackticks cleans fences. Amortizes AI cost across runs.

nodes.label: Provider-Agnostic LLM Layer
nodes.summary: Multi-provider (OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/Groq/Ollama) with zero per-provider code by depending on the Vercel AI SDK LanguageModel abstraction. Constructor takes one model handle; provider chosen by caller. Lesson: abstract one level above the vendor.

nodes.label: AI Rules Engine
nodes.summary: Plain-English inbox automation. Cost funnel: static/pattern matching first (address-anchored, AND/OR), LLM rule-selection only for the ambiguous remainder (Zod schema + 'no match' flag), second LLM call fills {{template}} action args, deterministic executor runs actions + writes ExecutedRule/ExecutedAction audit trail. Dry-run mode skips all writes.

nodes.label: AI Reply Drafting
nodes.summary: Tone-matched reply drafts + confidence (LOW/MED/HIGH). Assembles thread (per-msg ~3000 char cap), profile, knowledge, calendar slots, past drafts. Writing-style priority: explicit > learned > default. Learned style is a distilled PII-free summary (<=1500 chars) of the user's edits. Output normalizer + repetition guard.

nodes.label: Bulk Unsubscriber
nodes.summary: Real server-side one-click unsubscribe. Parses RFC 2369 List-Unsubscribe (extracts https URL), RFC 8058 one-click POST (body 'List-Unsubscribe=One-Click') with GET fallback, SSRF-guarded fetch, <=5 redirects with 301/302/303->GET downgrade. Persists per-sender Newsletter status (APPROVED/UNSUBSCRIBED/AUTO_ARCHIVED).

nodes.label: Bulk Archiver
nodes.summary: Risk-tiered archive triage. Pure function scoring senders by category-name substring: HIGH (marketing/promotion/newsletter/sale), MEDIUM (notification/alert/receipt/update), LOW (other). Returns {confidence, reason} candidates. Only HIGH is one-click — tiering is the safety mechanism. Scoring decoupled from execution.

nodes.label: Email Provider Abstraction
nodes.summary: Adapter+factory seam over Gmail + Outlook/Graph. One EmailProvider interface, GmailProvider/OutlookProvider adapters normalize to a shared ParsedMessage. createEmailProvider validates provider, fails fast on rate-limit, gets OAuth client (token refresh hidden in client getters). Label vs folder absorbed by adapters.

nodes.label: Ordered Backend Routing
nodes.summary: Each capability is a Channel with an ORDERED backends list (preferred→fallbacks). Two-phase check: collect all candidates, first `ok` wins, then first `warn` — so an installed-but-logged-out backend can't mask a working fallback. active_backend records the live one. User pin via <name>_backend (unknown value ignored). Switching backend = reorder a list, not code.

nodes.label: Channel Health Diagnostics
nodes.summary: probe_command EXECUTES a side-effect-free command to classify missing/broken(stale venv shebang, exit 126/127)/timeout/ok — which() existence is not health. doctor aggregates per-channel (exceptions degrade to error, stale active_backend cleared), groups by tier, annotates the active backend only when >1 exists, and audits config.yaml permissions (chmod 600). Retries only transient failures.

nodes.label: Cookie Credential Extraction
nodes.summary: Multi-browser cookie harvest (rookiepy→browser_cookie3) driven by declarative per-platform specs (named cookies vs whole Cookie-header). Validate-before-save: require a logged-in marker (auth_token+ct0, xq_a_token) — presence≠valid. Atomic 0o600 write (O_CREAT+mode, no write-then-chmod race). shlex-quoted best-effort mirrors into upstream tools' credential files.

nodes.label: Agent-Driven Install
nodes.summary: The installer is a markdown runbook an LLM agent executes: thin 'For Humans' one-line trigger over an imperative 'For AI Agents' program. Hard boundaries (no sudo, confined to ~/.agent-reach/, never pollute the workspace), env-branched steps (PEP 668 / Homebrew / Windows Store-alias), explicit user checkpoints, 'selector/router, never a wrapper'. install.md / update.md / daily watch = one lifecycle mechanism.

nodes.label: ONNX TTS Pipeline
nodes.summary: On-device TTS as four chained ONNX models: duration_predictor -> text_encoder -> vector_estimator (flow-matching, looped) -> vocoder. Unicode-code-point tokenizer covers 31 languages; voice is a small style JSON; outputs 44.1kHz WAV, no GPU.

nodes.label: Flow-Matching Sampler
nodes.summary: Generative core: iteratively denoise a gaussian latent into a speech latent via vector_estimator.onnx, called total_steps times (5-12, default 8). current_step/total_step are tensor inputs, giving a runtime quality/latency dial without retraining. Length-Aware RoPE keeps text<->speech aligned.

nodes.label: Expression Tags
nodes.summary: Inline prosody control via ~10 closed-vocabulary text tags (<laugh>, <breath>, <sigh>). Recognized in the text front-end and mapped to reserved token ids, so they flow through every stage as ordinary tokens and the trained models render them as acoustic events. No DSP, no reference audio.

nodes.label: Agentic Loop
nodes.summary: 3-stage linear pipeline (plan→generate→critique) in a single agent conversation thread. Critique Theater: 5-panelist jury (Designer/Critic/Brand/A11Y/Copy) with convergence enforcement. Iteration ceiling via OD_MAX_DEVLOOP_ITERATIONS.

nodes.label: Design Artifact Generation
nodes.summary: 4 pathways: HTML prototypes (inline-CSS React, sandboxed iframe), HTML decks (fixed skeleton + SLOT: fills), images (AIHubMix), and MP4 videos (Seedance/Wan/Veo/Sora). Async polling for long video renders.

nodes.label: Design Systems Library
nodes.summary: 150 DESIGN.md files with fixed 9-section schema (Visual Theme, Colors, Typography, Components, Layout, Elevation, Dos/Donts, Responsive, Agent Guide). Zero-config directory scan. Skills can filter to specific sections to reduce context bloat.

nodes.label: Skills System
nodes.summary: SKILL.md = minimal YAML frontmatter + markdown instructions. adaptAgentSkill() converts to PluginManifest via 3-layer merge (sidecar>adapter>fallback). SHA-256 digest for reproducibility. Pure-TS runtime (no Node imports) runs in daemon/browser/CI.

nodes.label: Plugin Ecosystem
nodes.summary: 3-tier discovery: official (bundled), community (registry), user custom (local drop-in). 22+ agent CLI adapters (one object: bin/versionArgs/buildArgs/streamFormat). Agent execution via stdio child processes. Sidecar open-design.json for highest-priority overrides.

nodes.label: Agent CLI Integration
nodes.summary: Dual-mode od CLI: default starts daemon+UI, subcommands are thin HTTP clients. PATH scan detects 22+ agent CLIs. Agents run as child processes, stdout relayed via SSE. Recoverable exit codes 64-75. MCP OAuth daemon-hosted.

nodes.label: BYOK Proxy
nodes.summary: POST /api/proxy/{anthropic,openai,azure,google,ollama,senseaudio}/stream. API key in request body. SSE response: start/delta/error/end events. SSRF protection blocks RFC1918, link-local, CGNAT. Azure needs apiVersion field.

nodes.label: Local-First Architecture
nodes.summary: 3-process: Electron main + Node.js Hono daemon + Next.js web UI. SQLite via better-sqlite3 (synchronous). Project files in ~/.od/projects/<id>/. Sidecar IPC: STATUS/EVAL/SCREENSHOT/CONSOLE/CLICK/SHUTDOWN. Optional S3 backend + Docker deployment.

nodes.label: Pan & Zoom Canvas
nodes.summary: Infinite pannable/zoomable viewport wrapping d3-zoom. Single [x,y,zoom] transform; factory exposes setViewport/scaleTo/syncViewport; a per-render filter encodes all product rules (pan-on-drag, activation keys, no-pan zones, pan-on-scroll).

nodes.label: Node Dragging
nodes.summary: d3-drag node movement: multi-select moves as rigid group, group-snaps as a unit, screen-space drag threshold, extent clamp, and rAF edge auto-pan that re-derives position from a stored last pointer.

nodes.label: Minimap Navigation
nodes.summary: Overview panel that is a remote control for the main viewport (not a 2nd viewport). d3-zoom on the mini SVG as a gesture recognizer; deltas scaled by minimap-shrink x main-zoom feed setViewportConstrained/scaleTo.

nodes.label: Connection Handles
nodes.summary: Drag-to-connect with no d3: raw pointer listeners on document/shadow-host. Closest-handle within radius BUT DOM elementFromPoint wins; strict/loose validity + self-loop block + custom predicate; onConnect on valid drop.

nodes.label: Node Resizer
nodes.summary: d3-drag on 8 control points. Corner-anchoring (top/left handles move x/y to pin the opposite edge), aspect captured at start, min/max + parent/child extents, children shifted inverse to origin move, emits only on real change.

nodes.label: Edge Path Algorithms
nodes.summary: Pure dependency-free SVG path fns: getBezierPath (curvature*25*sqrt(-d) loop trick, t=0.5 label weights), getSmoothStepPath (orthogonal route, corner radius clamped to half-segment), getStraightPath. Returns [path,labelX,labelY,offsetX,offsetY].

nodes.label: Reactive Store Architecture
nodes.summary: Zustand store + selector/equality subscriptions for surgical re-renders; array<->Map duality (user nodes[] vs derived nodeLookup of enriched internal nodes); framework-free @xyflow/system core with thin React/Svelte adapters.

nodes.label: Token Pipeline Orchestration
nodes.summary: End-to-end build engine: load+deep-merge tokens, keep 3 synced representations, then per-platform transform↔resolve convergence loop → filter → format → write. structuredClone-isolated platforms run concurrently; abstracted FS runs in browser or Node.

nodes.label: Reference Resolution Engine
nodes.summary: Resolves {token.path} aliases across the token graph: regex {([^}]+)}, dot-separated paths, transitive chains, multi-ref strings, object refs, number-type preservation, stack-based cycle detection, and conditional outputReferences (keep refs only when safe).

nodes.label: Transforms & Transform Groups
nodes.summary: Composable name/value/attribute transforms with optional filter; CTI (category/type/item) attribute convention; ordered per-platform groups (css/scss/js/ios/android/flutter/...); `transitive` flag runs value transforms after ref resolution; undefined return = defer.

nodes.label: Register / Extensibility API
nodes.summary: Eight-bucket in-process hook registry (transforms, transformGroups, formats, filters, actions, parsers, preprocessors, fileHeaders). Static (class-level) vs instance (_hooks) scopes deepmerged on read; per-type validation; string-name indirection from config to plugin; silent overwrite on collision.

nodes.label: Hand-Drawn Rendering
nodes.summary: Rough.js sketchy shapes with a FROZEN per-element seed fed into Rough every render so the wobble is deterministic (no shimmer on move/zoom/reload). Size-aware roughness, hand-built SVG-path rounded corners, disableMultiStroke for dashed, WeakMap shape cache keyed on versionNonce. Freedraw via perfect-freehand.

nodes.label: E2E-Encrypted Collaboration
nodes.summary: Zero-knowledge collab: AES-GCM 128 room key lives in the URL fragment (#room=ID,KEY) so the server never sees it; fresh 12-byte IV per message. socket.io relay only routes ciphertext. Delta broadcast via version Map + periodic full resync; reliable edits vs volatile presence. Encrypted Firebase persistence {sceneVersion,iv,ciphertext}, debounced, transactional reconcile on save.

nodes.label: Scene Reconciliation
nodes.summary: CRDT-free deterministic merge of local+remote element lists. Per-element last-write-wins: version is the logical clock, versionNonce the tiebreaker (lowest wins on equal version, using <= for a total relation). Active-editing (editing/resizing/new) guards override version math. Sorts + repairs fractional z-index last. Same fn runs client-side and inside the Firebase save transaction.

nodes.label: Fractional Indexing (z-order)
nodes.summary: String order keys (base-62) where any two have a key between them, so insert/move/reorder mutates ONLY the moved element. orderByFractionalIndex sorts by string compare (id tiebreak). Invariant predecessor<current<successor with detect (validateFractionalIndices) + repair of contiguous broken runs (syncInvalidIndices). JITTERED fork of generateNKeysBetween so concurrent same-gap inserts don't collide.

nodes.label: Signals Reactivity Engine
nodes.summary: Fine-grained reactivity (atom/computed/react) coordinated by a single global epoch counter. Dependencies auto-discovered by observing reads; staleness decided by epoch comparison, not value diffing. Signals carry diff-history so consumers can ask 'what changed since epoch N?'. Zero deps.

nodes.label: Reactive Record Store
nodes.summary: In-memory normalized record DB on signals. Flat 'type:id' records with scope (document/session/presence); reactive queries with incrementally-maintained indexes; every write emits a RecordsDiff {added,updated,removed} tagged source user|remote. Snapshots + migration on load.

nodes.label: Schema & Migrations
nodes.summary: Versioned bidirectional migrations. Namespaced ids (sequenceId/version) grouped into sequences with record/store/storage scope; cross-sequence dependsOn resolved by topological sort. Compact SerializedSchema travels with snapshots + connect handshake; up to upgrade, down to serve older peers.

nodes.label: Multiplayer Sync
nodes.summary: Server-authoritative optimistic-rebase sync over WebSockets. Clients edit locally, stash speculative changes, push NetworkDiffs with a clientClock; server applies, assigns serverClock, returns commit/discard/rebase and broadcasts patches. Clients rebase (rewind→apply→replay). Presence synced-not-persisted; tombstone catch-up; per-session schema migration. Reference server = Cloudflare Durable Object.

nodes.label: Deterministic Security Hooks
nodes.summary: Enforce rules on an AI agent's output via Claude Code hooks: PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop on Write|Edit|MultiEdit -> one dispatcher -> pluggable run(ctx)->finding|null checks. Exit 2 blocks the write; fail-open on crashes/timeouts. Comment/string stripping + test allowlist + pagokit-ignore bypass + audit log. Domain-agnostic guardrail engine.

nodes.label: Payment Provider Advisor
nodes.summary: Data-driven gateway selection: providers.json catalog with context-keyed score_modifiers. ≤5 questions -> hard filters (region/currency/methods/capability/KYC eliminate) -> score = base 5 + matching modifiers -> top pick. Recommendation gives reasons, real fee calc, KYC timeline, anti-patterns, 'verified on <date>'; never shows the score. Adding a provider = adding a JSON row.

nodes.label: Secure Payment Webhook & Idempotency
nodes.summary: Correct payment integration shape: checkout with crypto.randomUUID() idempotency key; webhook in strict order raw body -> verify signature -> reject stale timestamp (replay, ~300s) -> dedup by event id -> act -> 200. Parse-before-verify is the core bug. Per-provider scheme read from data. 5 tables incl. webhook_events_processed. Enforced by the deterministic hooks.

nodes.label: Interview-Driven App Scaffolding
nodes.summary: The product IS a prompt: CLAUDE.md + a /build-agent slash command drive a 5-phase, phase-gated flow (verify env, 10-question interview, generate the full app from inline templates parameterized by answers, local test, deploy). Generates only the chosen variant. No code ships; the app materializes when the LLM runs the recipe.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Provider Adapter Layer
nodes.summary: Adapter/strategy pattern for a messaging channel: abstract ProveedorWhatsApp + env-driven factory + Meta/Twilio adapters normalizing webhooks into a common MensajeEntrante. Core code never branches on provider; base carries a no-op validar_webhook only Meta overrides; lazy-imports the chosen adapter.

nodes.label: Per-Contact Conversation Memory
nodes.summary: Minimal async chat memory: one SQLAlchemy table keyed+indexed on phone number, stores user/assistant turns, reads last-N newest-first then reverses to chronological, returns LLM-shaped {role,content} dicts. SQLite local / Postgres prod via one env var (auto-rewrites to asyncpg). Window cap is the only cost control; fetch-before-save avoids duplicating the current turn.

nodes.label: Rule-Based Lead Scoring
nodes.summary: Deterministic 0-100 lead score: temperature base + contact completeness + capped engagement - recency decay + deal-value bonus, clamped; thresholds 70/40 -> hot/warm/cold. Offline, pure, doubles as the AI classifier's fallback.

nodes.label: AI Lead Classification (Claude)
nodes.summary: Optional Claude Sonnet lead grader -> strict JSON {temperature, confidence, nextAction, reasoning} in Spanish. Null-client-as-feature-flag, regex {...} JSON extraction, total silent fallback to the rule-based scorer. Same write contract.

nodes.label: Webhook Lead Ingestion
nodes.summary: Public POST endpoint mapping multilingual/Typeform field aliases -> contact. Optional x-webhook-secret auth, name required, defaults webhook/cold/0. No dedup, no scoring on ingest (by design); echoes received keys on 400.

nodes.label: MCP CRM Server
nodes.summary: Exposes a local SQLite CRM to Claude as 10 stdio MCP tools (contacts/deals/activities/pipeline/followups/stats) over better-sqlite3 (WAL, FKs). Read-tools pre-aggregate; no auth (stdio local-only); shares the live DB with the web app.

nodes.label: Kanban Pipeline (drag-and-drop)
nodes.summary: @dnd-kit sales pipeline board. Optimistic update with full-board snapshot rollback: snapshot on drag start, move in onDragOver, PUT /api/pipeline on drop, restore+toast on failure. 8px activation, closestCorners, DragOverlay.

nodes.label: CRM Dashboard KPIs & Analytics
nodes.summary: KPI cards (contacts, active deals, pipeline value, conversion) + Recharts breakdowns. One server-side getStats() reused by web UI and MCP crm_get_stats so numbers never drift; won/lost via stage flags not names; shared color tokens.

nodes.label: CSV Import / Export
nodes.summary: Partial-success JSON bulk import (201/207 + per-row errors, name required) and dual contacts/deals CSV export with correct escaping, UTF-8 BOM for Excel, humanized values, attachment download with dated filename.

nodes.label: Activity Tracking & Follow-up Buckets
nodes.summary: Activities timeline; pending follow-up = scheduledAt set & completedAt null. Buckets incomplete items into overdue/today/upcoming/unscheduled via Unix-seconds day-window math. Backs web board + MCP crm_get_followups; feeds scoring recency.

nodes.label: Self-Customizing CRM via Claude Code Commands
nodes.summary: The configuration layer is an AI agent: .claude/commands/*.md runbooks let Claude edit the real Drizzle schema/components to fit the business instead of a settings UI. Structural vs operational commands, guard-railed by CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md.

nodes.label: AI Carousel Generation
nodes.summary: OpenAI gpt-4o-mini forced to call one function whose params are a Zod content schema (zodToJsonSchema). Styled/unstyled split: LLM fills content only, styling defaults merged via Zod .default(). safeParse gate, temp 0.

nodes.label: DOM-to-PDF Export
nodes.summary: Export a live React view as a multi-page PDF: deep-clone node, strip editor chrome by id-prefix, re-inline fonts, proxy cross-origin imgs same-origin, html-to-image rasterize at 1.8x, slice tall canvas into 400x500 jsPDF pages. Reuses react-to-print clone plumbing.

nodes.label: OKLCH Theme Palettes
nodes.summary: DaisyUI-style named themes reduced to a 3-color runtime palette. Derives a readable foreground from any base color by interpolating toward black/white in OKLCH (direction by WCAG isDark) via culori. Hex/OKLCH inputs interchangeable.

nodes.label: Zod Form Persistence & JSON Portability
nodes.summary: Server-less document model: auto-persist RHF doc to localStorage, validate-on-read and self-heal (clear+defaults on schema drift), and per-field JSON import/export validated by the matching Zod sub-schema before setValue.

nodes.label: BYOK + Rate-Limited AI Action
nodes.summary: Next.js server action fronting an AI call with 3 gates: server key present -> optional per-IP Upstash slidingWindow(10,'15m') rate limit (opt-in by env) -> forward. Parallel client BYOK key hook. Zero-database throttling.

nodes.label: Graph Execution Engine
nodes.summary: ~100-line node/edge engine: nodes pass a shared mutable state dict, traversed from an entry point. Conditional nodes return the next node name (branch/retry). Per-node token/cost accounting. Boolean input-key DSL declares each node's data deps.

nodes.label: SmartScraper Pipeline
nodes.summary: Flagship: prompt + URL -> structured answer as a 3-node pipeline (Fetch->Parse->GenerateAnswer). 8 variants selected by (html_mode, reasoning, reattempt) flags via a lookup table over the same nodes. reattempt adds a conditional+regenerate self-healing retry loop.

nodes.label: Multi-Source Fetch Node
nodes.summary: Input normalization: URL (Chromium/requests/BrowserBase/Scrape.do) or local HTML/PDF/CSV/JSON/XML/MD/dir -> list[Document]. HTML->Markdown gated on OpenAI-family models. storage_state for authenticated scraping. Blank-page guard.

nodes.label: Map-Reduce Answer Generation
nodes.summary: Big-page extraction: 1 chunk -> single LLM call; N chunks -> parallel per-chunk calls (RunnableParallel) + a merge call. Pydantic/JSON output, 'NA' not-found sentinel, no-```json rule. Failures degrade to {error, raw_response} data.

nodes.label: Provider-Agnostic Model Layer
nodes.summary: '<provider>/<model>' string -> client across ~19 providers via LangChain init_chat_model + bespoke wrappers. Resolves max-input-tokens (model_token) that sizes chunking. model_instance escape hatch; optional InMemoryRateLimiter.

nodes.label: Search-Driven Scraping
nodes.summary: Question-only research: LLM rewrites prompt -> web search (DuckDuckGo default / Serper) -> scrape top-N with full SmartScraper -> merge per-page answers. A node runs other graphs (the real parallelism). Returns considered_urls for citations.

nodes.label: Change-Based Mutation Model
nodes.summary: Every edit is a serializable `change` (tagged by :type, ~40 types) applied via a process-change dispatch table. Each forward change is built with its inverse (redo vector / undo list), so undo/redo, persistence, and realtime collab all replay the same change list. Event sourcing for a design file.

nodes.label: Native Design Tokens
nodes.summary: Typed tokens (color/spacing/shadow/typography...) in ordered token sets; themes select which sets are active. Resolved view = merge active sets in global order (later overrides earlier) then resolve {path} references. All token edits ride the file change/undo system.

nodes.label: WASM/Skia Render Engine
nodes.summary: Rust->WASM (Emscripten) renderer on Skia drawing to one GPU canvas. C-ABI boundary (numbers+pointers only): 'current shape + setters' turtle API plus packed fixed-size binary records in shared linear memory (28-byte path segs, 160-byte fills; alloc->write->read->free). Tile-based incremental rendering with a frame-spread loop.

nodes.label: Screen Element Localization
nodes.summary: Finds the on-screen pixel of a UI element: resizes a screenshot to the aspect-ratio-nearest Anthropic Computer Use resolution (1024x768/1280x800/1366x768) via exact-pixel NSBitmapImageRep, POSTs to Claude with the computer tool + beta header, parses the tool_use coordinate, then clamps, scales to display points, and flips Y to AppKit's bottom-left origin. Returns a display-local CGPoint or nil.

nodes.label: Animated Pointer Guidance
nodes.summary: A transparent, click-through, never-key NSWindow per display hosts a SwiftUI blue-triangle buddy that springs behind the mouse, then flies to a detected element along a timer-driven quadratic Bezier arc (smoothstep easing, tangent rotation, sine scale-pulse) before pointing and returning. Multi-monitor routing via CompanionManager's globalized CGPoint.

nodes.label: Screen Capture with Self-Exclusion
nodes.summary: ScreenCaptureKit single-frame capture of every display that excludes all of the app's own windows (matched by bundle id) so the AI never sees its own overlays; returns cursor-screen-first labeled JPEGs and fixes the CG-vs-AppKit coordinate mismatch for multi-monitor cursor detection.

nodes.label: Push-to-Talk Streaming Transcription
nodes.summary: Global modifier-only hotkey (ctrl+option) via a listen-only CGEvent tap drives AVAudioEngine push-to-talk into a pluggable transcription provider; default AssemblyAI v3 streams 16kHz PCM16 over WebSocket with ordered turn-stitching, with Apple Speech and OpenAI as config-selected fallbacks.

nodes.label: Streaming Claude Screen Context
nodes.summary: Sends base64 screenshots plus a transcribed question to Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6, stream:true) through a Cloudflare Worker proxy, parsing SSE content_block_delta/text_delta events and emitting cumulative text to a @MainActor callback for progressive UI. Includes media-type sniffing and a TLS warm-up to survive large image payloads.

nodes.label: ElevenLabs Streaming TTS
nodes.summary: A @MainActor Swift client that POSTs reply text to a Cloudflare Worker /tts proxy (eleven_flash_v2_5, stability 0.5 / similarity_boost 0.75), receives MP3 as one Data blob, and plays it via a retained AVAudioPlayer. Despite the name, playback is whole-response/buffered with no per-sentence chunking; voice id lives on the proxy.

nodes.label: Cloudflare Worker API-Key Proxy
nodes.summary: A single-file Cloudflare Worker that keeps Anthropic, ElevenLabs, and AssemblyAI keys server-side as Worker secrets, exposing three POST routes — /chat (Claude Messages SSE pass-through), /tts (ElevenLabs MP3 stream), and /transcribe-token (short-lived AssemblyAI token broker). Streams upstream Response.body directly; no CORS, client auth, or rate-limiting.

nodes.label: Notch-Anchored Companion Overlay
nodes.summary: A menu-bar-only macOS app with two transparent surfaces: a borderless NSPanel that drops out of the menu-bar/notch strip beneath an NSStatusItem, and a per-screen full-screen click-through OverlayWindow at .screenSaver level using .ignoresSafeArea() to draw a cursor-following companion over the whole display incl. the notch. No safeAreaInsets API — the notch effect is anchoring + ignoring safe area.

nodes.label: First-Launch Video Onboarding
nodes.summary: First run is gated by a UserDefaults 'hasCompletedOnboarding' flag; the menu-bar panel primes and requests four macOS permissions (Microphone, Accessibility, Screen Recording, Screen Content) with native-prompt-then-Settings fallbacks, then on Start plays an aha-moment where a blue companion cursor types 'hey! i'm clicky' and a remote Mux HLS demo video (AVPlayer) fades in beside the live cursor. Replayable.

nodes.label: Notch-Shaped Always-On-Top Window
nodes.summary: Borderless non-activating NSPanel shaped to the MacBook notch, pinned above everything across Spaces & fullscreen via a private CGSSpace at Int32.max (flag=0x1 mandatory), plus a SkyLight-framework path for lock-screen visibility. Sizing from NSScreen.auxiliaryTopArea (width) + safeAreaInsets.top (height). Private CGS/SkyLight APIs via @_silgen_name and dlopen.

nodes.label: Multi-Provider Media Control
nodes.summary: Unified now-playing across Apple Music/Spotify (AppleScript), YouTube Music (local HTTP+WebSocket@26538), and system NowPlaying (private MediaRemote read via a Perl DynaLoader subprocess, commands via MediaRemote.framework in-process). One MediaControllerProtocol publishing a normalized PlaybackState; MusicManager selects+hot-swaps the active adapter; capability flags + deprecation fallback.

nodes.label: System HUD Replacement
nodes.summary: CGEventTap at .cghidEventTap (.defaultTap) intercepting NX_SYSDEFINED(14) media keys; suppresses Apple's OSD by returning nil (consuming the event), then sets the value itself — volume via public CoreAudio (kAudioDevicePropertyVolumeScalar/Mute), brightness/backlight via private API in an XPC helper — and shows a custom auto-hiding notch HUD. Needs Accessibility permission.

nodes.label: Chat-Completion Middleware
nodes.summary: One ordered async pipeline every chat completion flows through: process_chat_payload mutates a shared form_data in fixed order (pipeline/filter inlet -> memory -> web search -> image gen -> code interpreter -> tools -> files), then model call + stream, then process_chat_response runs outlet filters + background title/tag/follow-up tasks. Central fork: native FC exposes capabilities as tool specs vs non-native prompt-injection + a separate task-model tool-selection call. Server/MCP/terminal/client/builtin tools merge into one tools_dict; extra_params is the DI bundle; sources side-channel for citations.

nodes.label: Citation-Grounded Chat
nodes.summary: RAG chat that answers ONLY from pre-extracted evidence and tags every claim with inline @cite[n]/@cite[n|paper_id] markers, parsed back into source-anchored footnotes. No-embeddings word-overlap re-anchor for compacted summaries; delimiter-framed JSON streaming.

nodes.label: PDF Ingestion Pipeline
nodes.summary: Two-service webhook-driven background ingest: server validates+stages to S3, Celery worker extracts markdown (markitdown->pymupdf4llm) + page offsets, renders preview, runs 4 parallel Gemini structured-output calls (shared context cache), POSTs results to a webhook that enriches a placeholder Paper row.

nodes.label: PDF Highlights & Annotations
nodes.summary: Anchored PDF highlights storing raw_text + a zoom-invariant scaled-rects position blob (react-pdf-highlighter style), notes attached to highlights, one paper-note per paper. Role-stamped user/assistant (assistant rows immutable); zotero_annotation_key partial-unique index makes Zotero import idempotent.

nodes.label: Corpus & Academic Search
nodes.summary: Two separate search subsystems: knowledge-base ILIKE substring scan over papers+highlights+annotations (recency-ranked, no embeddings) and external OpenAlex discovery (filters/sort + inverted-index abstract rebuild); Exa is agent-only. Plus 3-pass metadata hydration (DOI resolve -> enrich -> agentic fallback).

nodes.label: Audio Overview (TTS)
nodes.summary: Spoken 'audio overview' of a paper or project: LLM writes a length-targeted podcast-style script with [^n] citations, markers stripped, chunked at ~10k chars, synthesized via Azure OpenAI gpt-4o-mini-tts, concatenated to one WAV (custom RIFF writer), stored in S3. FastAPI BackgroundTask + poll + presigned URL.

nodes.label: Multi-Path Authentication
nodes.summary: Three auth paths over opaque server-side session tokens (NOT JWT): Google OAuth2, email 6-digit code, and Zotero OAuth 1.0a (library link, not login). 64-char token in a sessions table, httpOnly cookie or Bearer. Refuse-don't-merge cross-provider; several documented security gaps (unverified state, plaintext codes).

nodes.label: Scrape Engine + Fallback Pipeline
nodes.summary: URL -> clean output (md/html/screenshot/links/json) via a capability-driven engine fallback chain (fetch -> playwright -> fire-engine chrome-cdp/tlsclient with stealth/retry -> pdf) chosen by feature flags, then a fixed transformer stack. maxAge index cache for low latency.

nodes.label: Queue-Backed Crawl
nodes.summary: Recursive site crawl on BullMQ + Redis state: one kickoff job seeds the frontier (sitemap + start page), each scrape job extracts links and enqueues children, dedup via atomic Redis SADD (lockURL). Done = jobs==jobs_done AND kickoff done AND sitemap done. Status pages a ZSET; WS streams; per-team concurrency.

nodes.label: LLM Extract (map-reduce)
nodes.summary: Prompt+schema+URL(s)/domain -> one structured object via an async map-reduce job: analyzeSchemaAndPrompt decides single-answer vs multi-entity, spreadSchemas splits the schema, docs chunked x50 and batch-extracted concurrently, null-aware merge + dedup + rerank, then merged. Redis-backed status steps.

nodes.label: Web Search (+ optional scrape)
nodes.summary: Query a search provider (fire-engine -> SearXNG -> DuckDuckGo fallback) returning normalized web/news/images, then optionally scrape every result concurrently through the same scrape pipeline (3-day cache) and merge content back by URL. Soft-fails; search bills search credits, scrapes self-bill; keyless reserve/reconcile.

nodes.label: Site URL Map
nodes.summary: Fast URL discovery for a domain (no page scrape): merge sitemap.xml + fire-engine index (<=100, cached per-URL), dedup, filter by subdomain/external/limit, and optionally rerank by embedding cosine similarity against a search query. Seconds, not a crawl.

nodes.label: Agentic Browser Actions
nodes.summary: An AI agent drives a hosted browser to satisfy a natural-language instruction (click/scroll/type/wait) before capture, returning post-interaction HTML/markdown. A scrape-pipeline transformer (performAgent) calling fire-engine smart-scrape; tiered Gemini models, cost-capped soft-fail, disabled under ZDR.

nodes.label: Deep Research Loop
nodes.summary: Autonomous depth-bounded research: from a topic (no URLs), loop generate-queries -> search+scrape -> record sources -> analyze -> pick next topic until maxDepth or timeLimit, then synthesize a report. Async job, Redis-streamed activities+sources; reuses the search+scrape path.

nodes.label: Generate llms.txt
nodes.summary: Auto-generate a site's llms.txt (titled page list + one-line descriptions) and optional llms-full.txt (full markdown, delimiter-separated) by composing map -> scrape -> per-page one-line-summary LLM. Async job, Redis status, Supabase cache, entry/page caps.

nodes.label: Credit Billing & Concurrency
nodes.summary: Metering: checkTeamCredits gates work from a cached balance chunk; billTeam decrements (Supabase RPC) non-blocking; sub-jobs self-bill. Concurrency via Redis sorted-sets: over-limit jobs parked in a queue, released as actives finish under plan/crawl maxConcurrency; expiry-scored actives swept.

nodes.label: Keyless & x402 Paid Access
nodes.summary: Two account-less tiers over the same metering. Keyless: IP -> synthetic team preview_keyless_{ip}, two env-gated daily limits (off unless both set), reserve-then-reconcile credits in Redis, agent-aware 429. x402: HTTP-402 pay-per-call via @x402/express EVM exact scheme settled by a facilitator on a configurable network.

nodes.label: Declarative (Low-Code) CDK
nodes.summary: Define a whole connector in a YAML manifest (instance of a component JSON-schema); a runtime interprets it: resolve $refs -> propagate $parameters -> validate -> ModelToComponentFactory builds live components. One manifest runs on a sync or concurrent engine (worker count declared). Normalization+migration keep old manifests working.

nodes.label: Airbyte Protocol
nodes.summary: Universal source<->destination contract: a connector is a CLI emitting newline-delimited JSON AirbyteMessages (tagged union) over stdout. Commands spec/check/discover/read; read interleaves RECORD + STATE (resumable checkpoints) with LOG/TRACE/CONTROL. Language-agnostic (Docker + stdout); the platform persists STATE.

nodes.label: Incremental Sync & State
nodes.summary: Cursor-based incremental reads: DatetimeBasedCursor slices [start-lookback,end] into step windows -> one stream_slice per window (injected via interpolation), observes each record's cursor_field tracking the MAX, and emits state {cursor_field: highest} at slice boundaries so the next run resumes. Lookback catches late updates; destinations dedup on PK.

nodes.label: Declarative HTTP Stream Stack
nodes.summary: Four swappable components + a retriever loop pull records from a REST API: HttpRequester (interpolated url/params + error-handler/backoff) -> DefaultPaginator (strategy computes next token; option says where to inject) -> DpathExtractor (field_path into JSON; [] = whole response) -> RecordSelector (filter+normalize+transform). SimpleRetriever loops until token is None.

nodes.label: Connector Builder Test-Read
nodes.summary: Backend for the no-code builder: run a bounded, instrumented test read of an in-progress manifest with the SAME production engine, capped by TestLimits{max_records,max_pages_per_slice,max_slices}, capturing every HTTP request/response grouped by slice/page + inferred schema, returned as a StreamRead wrapped in a protocol RECORD. Plus resolve/full-resolve manifest.

nodes.label: MBQL — Metabase Query AST
nodes.summary: A database-agnostic query as a typed nested data structure (EDN/JSON) formally specified by a Malli schema: {:database,:type,:query} with tagged-vector clauses ([:field id opts], [:sum field], [:= lhs rhs]). Everything downstream rewrites the query as DATA; only the driver compiles to a dialect. Legacy + MBQL-5, normalized to one.

nodes.label: Query Processor Middleware Pipeline
nodes.summary: Three-phase engine: preprocess threads the MBQL query through ~40 query->query middleware (normalize, validate, resolve joins, permissions/sandboxing, params, desugar, default limit); compile via driver mbql->native; execute as a reducible streaming rows through a reducing-fn (rff) with cooperative cancellation; postprocess threads rows through reducing-fn middleware (format/limit/annotate). Built once by reduce; hot-reloaded.

nodes.label: Multimethod Driver Abstraction
nodes.summary: One interface, N databases via Clojure multimethods + an isa? hierarchy. Drivers register! with a parent (:postgres->:sql-jdbc->:sql); multimethods (mbql->native, execute-reducible-query, describe-*, database-supports?) dispatch on the driver keyword and fall through the hierarchy. SQL DBs inherit one shared MBQL->HoneySQL->string compiler (per-[driver,clause] ->honeysql multimethods) and override only dialect quirks.

nodes.label: Visualization Auto-Selection
nodes.summary: A frontend registry of chart types where each visualization self-describes applicability: getSensibleDisplays(data) filters the registry by each viz's isSensible(data); the chosen one's checkRenderable validates with a user-facing reason; renders with column remapping (FK id->label) and multi-series transforms. New charts plug in by registering and answering the same predicates.

nodes.label: Debounced File Watcher
nodes.summary: Watches dirs via the OS notify API, polls a channel non-blockingly, debounces by last-seen-time per path (cap+cleanup), acts only on Create/Modify, routes each file to its watched dir's allowed rule set via longest-prefix canonical matching, and runs a background initial scan of existing files. Skips symlinks + NotFound races.

nodes.label: File Rules Engine
nodes.summary: Condition->action rules over file paths. A Condition is an all-optional struct matched by AND (extension(s), glob/regex name, size >/<, age-days >/<, is_directory, is_hidden; empty=all). Engine evaluates ordered enable-able rules (first/all/filtered-by-name, stop_processing) and executes actions, stopping after a destructive one. Perf: one metadata syscall for size+age; thread-local cap-1000 glob/regex caches.

nodes.label: File Actions Executor
nodes.summary: A tagged Action enum with per-variant execute(path): Move/Copy (~-expanded dest, opt create_destination, overwrite-guarded), Rename (pattern {name}{ext}{date}), Trash (recoverable) vs Delete (permanent), Archive (zip), RunScript (placeholder {path}{name}{dir} -> platform shell). Move/rename/trash/delete are destructive and stop the chain.

nodes.label: Website Cloning Pipeline
nodes.summary: 5-phase AI pipeline (recon → foundation → component specs → parallel build → assemble+QA) that converts a target URL into a deployable Next.js 16/React 19 app. Uses getComputedStyle() for pixel-accurate design extraction, git worktrees for parallel agent builds, and spec-driven component construction.

nodes.label: Browser Design Token Extraction
nodes.summary: getComputedStyle() on every DOM element via page.evaluate() in headless Chromium to extract final resolved CSS values. Frequency analysis reveals the design system. Interaction states captured via pseudo-class injection. Responsive variants by viewport resize. Colors converted to oklch for Tailwind v4.

nodes.label: Component Specification Generation
nodes.summary: Generates structured Markdown spec documents per page section with: exact oklch colors, px typography values, interaction state diffs, responsive layout changes, public/ asset paths, and real content samples. Spec quality determines AI builder output quality. Stored in docs/research/components/.

nodes.label: Multi-Platform Agent Sync
nodes.summary: AGENTS.md as single source of truth for project instructions. sync-agent-rules.sh generates 11+ platform copies (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, .cursor/rules/, .github/copilot-instructions.md, etc.). sync-skills.mjs propagates skill definitions. Generated files carry DO NOT EDIT headers and are committed to git.

nodes.label: Parallel Worktree Build
nodes.summary: git worktree add creates one isolated checkout per AI agent on a separate branch. Agents build non-overlapping page sections concurrently with no merge conflicts. Pre-written page.tsx slot pattern prevents the assembly file from being a conflict hotspot. Branches merged sequentially after all agents finish.

nodes.label: Sandboxed Extension System
nodes.summary: iframe-sandboxed extension runtime with postMessage bridge, dual-layer permission enforcement (TS frontend + Rust backend), TypeScript SDK with Commander CLI scaffolding, and Chokidar hot-reload in dev mode

nodes.label: AI Agent with Tool Calling
nodes.summary: full multi-provider AI agent (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/Ollama/OpenRouter) with 3-tier tool registry (builtin/extension/MCP), streaming via Tauri events, agentic loop with tool-call rounds, and a provider-abstraction layer normalizing all vendor APIs

nodes.label: Pattern-Based Secret Redaction
nodes.summary: multi-pattern regex pipeline that intercepts clipboard content, AI context, and user input before storage, redacting API keys, JWTs, credit cards, and secrets in place; AES-256-GCM encryption at rest with OS keychain key management

nodes.label: MCP Sidecar Auto-Detection
nodes.summary: scans Claude Desktop, Cursor, Cline, Continue, and Zed config files to auto-import MCP server definitions; rewrites npx→bundled bun and uvx→bundled uv; manages stdio subprocesses with exponential-backoff restart and namespaces tools as mcp__slug__name

nodes.label: Silent AI Text Transform
nodes.summary: global hotkey triggers background LLM call without opening the launcher UI; reads from OS selection/clipboard/typed/none, runs privacy redaction, sends single buffered LLM call, writes to accessibility replace/clipboard/paste/HUD; per-command provider/model override

nodes.label: Capability-Based Module System
nodes.summary: Runtime capability registry where every subsystem (codec, output, UI, network) is a module declaring (capability_string, priority_score). module_need() collects, sorts by score, tries in order, returns first success. Enables hardware-acceleration fallback, platform isolation, and third-party plugins with zero core changes.

nodes.label: Media Pipeline
nodes.summary: Multi-stage runtime-assembled pipeline: MRL parse → access (bytes) → stream filters → demux (container/packets) → decoder threads (compressed→raw) → vout/aout (render). Input thread drives a main loop with control queue (seek, pause, rate). All stages swappable modules; timeshift buffer optional between demux and decoders.

nodes.label: libVLC Embeddable Engine
nodes.summary: LGPL C library wrapping VLC's full multimedia engine. API: libvlc_new(args) → libvlc_media_new_location(url) → libvlc_media_player_new() → set_xwindow/hwnd/nsobject() → play(). Event system fires on internal thread; state machine covers Opening/Buffering/Playing/Paused/Ended/Error. Bindings for C++, Python, C#, Java, Swift.

nodes.label: Stream Output & Transcoding
nodes.summary: Declarative stream_out chain: '#transcode{vcodec=h264,vb=800,acodec=mp3}:http{mux=ts,dst=:8080/}'. Transcode module decodes→filters→re-encodes per track; duplicate fans to N outputs. VLM API manages named broadcasts. PCR-aware for MPEG-TS. Hardware encoders (NVENC/VideoToolbox) drop-in via module system.

nodes.label: Unified Permission Abstraction
nodes.summary: Abstract Permission base class normalizing 18 Apple-platform permissions onto a 4-state status model (authorized/denied/notDetermined/notSupported) + uniform request/openSettingPage; sub-flavors carried as associated values on a Kind enum.

nodes.label: Modular Per-Permission Packaging
nodes.summary: Hub-and-spoke Swift packaging: 15+ per-permission SPM products/CocoaPods subspecs over one core, each gated by a -D compile flag, so consumers compile in only what they use and never reference sensitive Apple APIs they don't need (App Review surface reduction).

nodes.label: Async-to-Sync Status Bridging
nodes.summary: DispatchSemaphore (and static-anchor delegate) pattern that exposes a synchronous status getter over Apple's callback/delegate-only authorization APIs; the deadlock-safe async-to-sync bridge.

nodes.label: AI Chat Stream
nodes.summary: Multi-provider LLM streaming chat via Vercel AI SDK. Assembles context (history, file contents, MCP tools, code index), streams response chunks to renderer, parses XML action tags mid-stream to write files and install deps, saves full SDK message objects to SQLite for multi-turn continuity.

nodes.label: MCP Integration
nodes.summary: Model Context Protocol client manager: SQLite-backed server configs, per-tool consent tracking, 8s tool listing timeout with forced dispose, OAuth discovery+PKCE flow, error classification (discovery_failed vs unauthorized) for actionable UI messages.

nodes.label: Code Explorer
nodes.summary: TypeScript-compiler-backed codebase indexer in worker threads. Discovers tsconfig in monorepos by scoring dir names, extracts exported symbols with line numbers, ranks against query via stemming+architecture heuristics, injects top symbols into AI system prompt.

nodes.label: Dependency Manager
nodes.summary: Auto npm installer triggered by AI-emitted <dyad-add-dependency> XML tags. Validates package names via regex, selects npm/pnpm, optionally routes through Socket Firewall, executes install with timeout, replaces tag in stored DB message with result tag.

nodes.label: Cloud Deploy
nodes.summary: One-click Vercel deployment from a local Electron builder. Token validation, framework auto-detection (config files then package.json deps), project create via REST API, env var sync (Neon/Supabase) before first build, deployment status polling for live URL.

nodes.label: BYOK Settings
nodes.summary: Bring-your-own-keys settings system: atomic JSON write (temp+rename), Electron safeStorage encryption for all secrets (API keys, tokens, service accounts), effective settings merge with defaults, unlogged IPC handlers, custom AI provider CRUD in SQLite.

nodes.label: Multi-App Library
nodes.summary: Multi-project portfolio in a local builder: SQLite app+collection schema, template scaffold with git init, child-process lifecycle map, commit-keyed PNG thumbnails with LRU pruning, soft-deleted collections, ripgrep content search with byte-to-char offset conversion.

nodes.label: Image Generation
nodes.summary: In-builder AI image generation: 4 style-theme prompt prefixes, AbortController map for cancellation, 120s timeout, handles b64_json and URL responses, HTTPS-only URL validation, 50MB cap, file-locked write to .dyad/media/, returns relative path for AI code references.

nodes.label: Multi-Provider LLM System
nodes.summary: Singleton LLMManager auto-discovers BaseProvider subclasses, caches static+dynamic model lists, and exposes a unified getModelInstance() interface. API keys travel in cookies. 19+ providers via Vercel AI SDK. Framework-detection-free — just implement BaseProvider and register.

nodes.label: WebContainer Runtime
nodes.summary: Boots a full Node.js runtime in the browser tab using @webcontainer/api. Writes files via wc.fs.writeFile(), runs npm/node via wc.spawn(), serves live HTTP previews from the container. Requires COEP+COOP headers. Singleton per tab via import.meta.hot.data.

nodes.label: Artifact Code Generation
nodes.summary: StreamingMessageParser state machine extracts <boltArtifact>/<boltAction> XML tags from LLM output stream and fires callbacks on open/stream/close. File actions write to WebContainer, shell actions spawn processes. Strips markdown fences. Handles mid-response token limit continuations.

nodes.label: Context Optimization
nodes.summary: Two pre-turn LLM calls: createSummary() collapses old history into structured project summary; selectContext() picks ≤5 relevant files via AI outputting <includeFile>/<excludeFile> XML. Both emit SSE progress events. Gitignore-style file filtering. Optional per-request feature flag.

nodes.label: One-Click Deployment
nodes.summary: Server routes for Vercel (v9 project API + v13 deploy API, 2-min poll) and Netlify (SHA-1 content-addressable hash protocol, 60s poll, 3-retry file upload). Framework detection from package.json deps + config files. Project IDs cached client-side for re-deploys.

nodes.label: Browser Git
nodes.summary: isomorphic-git clone in the browser routed through a server-side Remix CORS proxy that adds Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * to git server responses. Shallow clone (depth:1), binary file exclusion via TextDecoder fatal:true, LightningFS in-memory storage. detectProjectCommands() seeds the chat.

nodes.label: MCP Tool Integration
nodes.summary: MCPService singleton connects to MCP servers via SSEClientTransport, lists tools via client.listTools(), injects definitions into system prompt, and routes LLM tool calls to executeTool(). Config arrives per-request; connections cached in singleton. SSE-only in browser (no stdio).

nodes.label: Chat Persistence (IndexedDB)
nodes.summary: IndexedDB 'boltHistory' v2 with chats store (id+urlId indexes, messages, metadata) and snapshots store (chatId key, file tree). Supports fork-at-message, duplicate, delete. Deployment IDs in metadata.netlifySiteId/vercelProjectId for re-deploys. Context summaries stored as chatSummary-typed messages.

nodes.label: Semantic Symbol Tools
nodes.summary: MCP-exposed LSP-backed toolkit for AI agents: find/navigate/edit code symbols by name-path (ClassName/method), replace bodies, insert before/after, rename across codebase, safe-delete, pull diagnostics — no line numbers needed, 40+ languages.

nodes.label: Agent Dashboard
nodes.summary: Flask REST API + SPA dashboard running in a background thread alongside the agent. In-memory log ring-buffer, tool call stats, config/memory/task CRUD. Platform-adaptive display: browser (Linux/macOS), pywebview native window (Windows), or system-tray aggregator for multiple instances.

nodes.label: Agentic Research Planning
nodes.summary: Two-phase deep research: a cheap model produces a structured plan (1-5 topics x 3-5 todos), then a capable model runs an autonomous agent up to 75 steps with search/browse/code/file tools, all inside one outer tool call. Outer chat loop capped at 5 steps.

nodes.label: Grounded Retrieval + Inline Citations
nodes.summary: Inline [text](url) citations with NO post-processor: retrieval tools return {url,title,content}, the model gets them raw, and a strict system-prompt rule block makes it cite inline. Plus domain dedup, provider fallback chain, and content truncation.

nodes.label: Multi-Provider Model Gateway
nodes.summary: One scira-* alias per model; a single customProvider maps each alias to a real call (direct, retryable-with-fallback, gateway-brokered, or custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint). ~130 models / 22 providers. Client-safe metadata registry split from secret-bearing wiring.

nodes.label: Tool & Search-Mode Registry
nodes.summary: Scope an LLM's tools per mode: two parallel maps (mode->tool-name[] and mode->systemPrompt). Resolver gates access and silently degrades gated modes to web. Tools are factories (close over runtime config); names resolved to objects at call site. 18 modes, ~30 tools.

nodes.label: Resumable Streaming Search
nodes.summary: Decouple durable generation (consumeStream + after(), buffered to Redis via ai-resumable-stream) from reconnectable delivery. GET resumes by replaying Redis chunks or returns the just-saved message within 15s; DELETE aborts via a shared AbortController. Graceful non-resumable fallback if no Redis.

nodes.label: Scheduled Monitoring Agents (Lookouts)
nodes.summary: Cron-scheduled research agent on QStash. One route does CRUD + the cron callback (disambiguated by signature header). Each fire runs the existing research pipeline, persists a browsable chat, appends a runHistory JSON entry, emails the result. Cron stored UTC, timezone separate.

nodes.label: Autopilot — Scheduled Agent Work
nodes.summary: Recurring agent work via cron/webhook/api on a generic DB-backed distributed-lock scheduler (sys_cron_executions): unique (job,scope,plan_time) is both the lock and the audit log; N instances tick safely, one wins each plan. 3 tables: autopilot/trigger/run.

nodes.label: Unified Runtimes + CLI Auto-Detection
nodes.summary: Local daemon auto-detects 11+ agent CLIs by PATH probe (env-overridable), registers each as a runtime, and wraps each behind a backend that normalizes its native stream (stream-json/app-server/acp/json) into uniform task events. Binary-name traps: cursor-agent, kiro-cli.

nodes.label: Agents as Teammates
nodes.summary: Actor polymorphism: every authored/assigned/addressed row stores (*_type member|agent, *_id) so an agent creates issues, comments, gets assigned, and hits the inbox like a human. A "blocker" is emergent (agent status + issue status + action_required inbox + comment), not a table.

nodes.label: Autonomous Execution Lifecycle + WS Streaming
nodes.summary: agent_task_queue state machine (queued->dispatched->running->completed|failed|cancelled) across server+daemon. WS dispatch is a wakeup HINT; daemon claims via transactional HTTP. Typed, seq-numbered transcript events (text/tool_use/tool_result/error) over one multiplexed socket.

nodes.label: Duration-Aware Frame Budgeting
nodes.summary: Frame COUNT budgeted by video duration (short=dense w/ 12-frame floor, long capped at 100), fps back-derived as count/duration and hard-clamped to 2fps. Separate denser tier table for --start/--end focus mode. ffmpeg extract returns absolute per-frame timestamps.

nodes.label: Captions-First Transcription Cascade
nodes.summary: Cost-ordered transcript: parse yt-dlp WebVTT captions (deduping YouTube rolling duplicates) first/free; else extract tiny 16kHz mono mp3 and POST to Groq whisper-large-v3 / OpenAI whisper-1 via hand-rolled stdlib multipart (no SDK) with retry/backoff. Non-default UA dodges Groq's Cloudflare WAF. All sources normalize to {start,end,text}.

nodes.label: Agentic Video-Understanding Pipeline (/watch)
nodes.summary: Skill that gives an agent a video 'sense' without a video model: orchestrator turns video into timestamped frames + transcript, prints a markdown report of frame paths; the agent Reads the images and answers. Modalities aligned on a shared timestamp clock; delivered via a 5-step SKILL.md contract with graceful degradation everywhere.

nodes.label: In-Memory MVCC Storage Engine
nodes.summary: In-memory vertex/edge store: per-object delta chains walked backward by timestamp for 3 isolation levels; 56-byte trivially-destructible Delta; pointer-tagging packs type+flags free; non-sequential edge deltas relax MVCC for fast bulk import; lock-free reads, per-object lock only for chain mutation; commit = one atomic timestamp store.

nodes.label: WAL + Snapshot Durability
nodes.summary: Crash-safety for an in-memory store: append-only WAL of 40+ delta variants framed per-transaction with a deferred commit-flag patch for atomicity + per-txn CRC; sectioned snapshots with an offset table for seek-based load; recovery = newest snapshot then replay later WALs; versioned format (kVersion 36) with composable version-dependent decoders; retention keeps N snapshots + bridging WALs.

nodes.label: USearch Vector Index
nodes.summary: Embedded HNSW ANN index (USearch) over node/edge embeddings, key = vertex pointer; per-index metric/dimension/scalar-kind/capacity; SINGLE/WILDCARD/ANY_OF/ALL_OF membership filter; copy-on-write index registry for snapshot-stable reads; READ_UNCOMMITTED safe under UNIQUE host access; undo-able OOM-protected drop; serialized into snapshots + WAL create/drop recovery.

nodes.label: Power-Assertion Wake Lock
nodes.summary: Prevent macOS idle sleep via IOKit power assertions behind a testable PowerAssertionAPI seam. displayAndSystem vs systemOnly assertion types; a timed session (Timer) auto-releases on expiry; a battery-threshold monitor (IOPS power sources) ends the session on low battery; deinit always releases.

nodes.label: Sparkle EdDSA Auto-Update
nodes.summary: Self-updating macOS app via Sparkle with EdDSA-signed releases. SPUStandardUpdaterController + Info.plist (SUFeedURL to a raw-GitHub appcast.xml, SUPublicEDKey). A release script builds, zips with ditto, and runs generate_appcast to EdDSA-sign; the pushed appcast.xml is the feed and binaries live on GitHub Releases. Zero update server.

nodes.label: Coverage-Gated Testable Core
nodes.summary: 100% line-coverage gate over a curated logic core. Decision logic is extracted out of UI/system shells into pure types + protocol seams; thin OS-touching impls go in a justified, self-policing EXCLUDE list; a pre-push hook runs xccov and fails the push if any non-excluded file is below 100%. New files are not exempt by default.

nodes.label: Ranking-Rules Bucket Sort
nodes.summary: Order search results by a fixed, reorderable cascade of ranking rules (words, typo, proximity, attribute, sort, exactness) applied as a bucket sort over RoaringBitmap candidate sets. Each rule breaks ties left by the previous and only sorts as deep as the requested page; typo/proximity are cheapest-path costs over a query-term graph.

nodes.label: Length-Gated Typo Tolerance
nodes.summary: Typo tolerance with the typo budget gated by word length (0 typos for short words, then 1 then 2 as words lengthen; thresholds are index settings), an exact-words FST override, and last-word prefix expansion for search-as-you-type. A query word becomes a set of derivations looked up in the inverted index, each carrying its typo cost so exact matches still rank first.

nodes.label: Auto-Batching Write Scheduler
nodes.summary: Coalesce a stream of write tasks into efficient batches: classify each by kind, greedily merge the longest compatible prefix of consecutive same-index tasks into one batch (a compatibility matrix, not a timer), process atomically in one transaction, and keep durable per-task status. Structural ops like index delete/swap break the batch.
